parameters.query: SELECT category_id, category_name, name_ro FROM catalogs.categories WHERE marketplace = $1 AND is_active = true AND ( $2 = '' OR category_name ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%' OR COALESCE(name_ro, '') ILIKE '%' || $2 || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN category_name ILIKE $2 || '%' THEN 0 WHEN COALESCE(name_ro, '') ILIKE $2 || '%' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, COALESCE(name_ro, category_name) LIMIT 50;
